title: Claude Code SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: Validates YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files against Anthropic's documented Claude Code skill fields. Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills (March 2026). Unrecognized fields are silently ignored by Claude Code at runtime but flagged here to prevent dead metadata.

name.description: Display name and /slash-command. If omitted, uses directory name. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. Claude uses this to decide when to load automatically. WARNING: Claude Code's skill indexer may misparse YAML multiline indicators (>, |, >-, |-). Use single-line strings.

argument-hint.description: Hint shown during autocomplete for expected arguments. Example: '[issue-number]' or '[filename] [format]'.

disable-model-invocation.description: Set to true to prevent Claude from automatically loading this skill. Only user invocation via /name allowed. Default: false.

user-invocable.description: Set to false to hide from the / menu. Only Claude can invoke automatically. Default: true.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated tool names. Example: 'Read, Write, Glob, Bash'

allowed-tools.description: Tools Claude can use without asking permission when this skill is active.

model.description: Model to use when this skill is active. Accepts aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) or full IDs (claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4, claude-haiku-4-5).

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run in a forked subagent context.

agent.description: Subagent type when context: fork is set. Options: built-in (Explore, Plan, general-purpose) or custom agent name.

hooks.description: Hooks scoped to this skill's lifecycle.
